UW-14  WELDING OF PRESSURE VESSELS — GENERAL. (a) All welding shall be performed using procedures qualified in accordance with QW-200. (b) Welders shall be qualified as required by QW-300. (c) Welding processes shall be limited to those in UW-26. Unless exempted by UW-29, PWHT shall be performed per UW-28. Except as permitted by UW-52 for spot examination, all welds shall be examined per UW-11. See also UW-9 for joint design. Subject to the material specification, UG-80 shall govern. Refer to QW-404 for filler metal requirements.
